Records.authors: Adams, Luise, Chaubey, Ekta, Weinzierl, Stefan
Records.description: Two-loop planar double box for ttbar with closed top loop. 7 propagators (5 massive m, 2 massless) + 2 ISPs. 44 MIs in 27 topologies. Three inequivalent elliptic curves. DE solved as iterated integrals to all orders in eps, explicit through O(eps^4).
Records.familyName: planar double box (ttbar, closed top loop)

Records.authors: Adams, Luise, Chaubey, Ekta, Weinzierl, Stefan
Records.description: PRL letter: planar double box for ttbar with closed top loop. 7 propagators (5 massive, 2 massless). 42 MIs. Three elliptic curves. Solved to all orders in eps via DEs with strictly lower-triangular eps^0 part.
Records.familyName: planar double box (ttbar, closed top loop)
Records.location: Section 2 ('The integral'): eq. labeled def_integral (the I_{ν_1...ν_7} definition) together with the unnumbered align-block defining P_1..P_7 immediately below (letter_topbox_rev.tex lines 136-165); fig. fig_double_box_graph (fig1.eps) for the topology.

Names: planar double box (ttbar, closed top loop)
